_description: Gate config for the build-websites-tools sample site. Derived from templates/marketing-site.json in build-websites-tools v0.3.1. The required pages list is enforced by the loader and must not shrink.

aiInstrumentation._note: GA4 check is opted out because the sample site ships no analytics by design (see /privacy). Other AI instrumentation dimensions remain enforced.

skip.reason: Sample site ships no conversion funnel and no analytics by design (see /privacy). It is the build-websites-tools proof-of-builder showcase, not a monitored board, so it has no /api/track relay to enforce. Mirrors the aiInstrumentation.ga4 opt-out above.
